facebook.caption: 4.7 stars on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Only 78 reviews means the crowds haven't caught up yet. Lemon Restaurant sits in Cửa Lấp, away from the main tourist strip, pulling consistent ratings from the people who actually find it. That ratio matters. High score, low noise. Save this before the algorithm does it for you.
